类 JakartaJaxrsAnnotations

java.lang.Object
com.github.hsindumas.stagger.constants.JakartaJaxrsAnnotations
public final class JakartaJaxrsAnnotations extends Object
Java EE has been renamed Jakarta EE, this class is an upgraded replacement for JAXRSAnnotations

JAX-RS Annotations
